tagline: North Bay roofing done right, since the start
seoDescription: Roofmaster is a Santa Rosa roofing contractor serving the North Bay with re-roofs, leak repairs, flat roofs, dry rot work, and seamless gutters.
heroHeading: Santa Rosa's roofing crew for re-roofs, leaks, and flat-roof fixes
heroSubheading: Residential and commercial roofing across Santa Rosa and the North Bay — composition, shake/tile conversions, cool roofs, dry rot repair, and seamless gutters.
highlights: Serving Santa Rosa & the North Bay
aboutBody: Roofmaster is a locally based roofing contractor at 1104 Calistoga Rd in Santa Rosa, serving homeowners and businesses throughout the North Bay. The company handles the full range of roofing work — from full re-roofs and energy-saving composition shingles to hot tar and cool roofs, shake-to-tile conversions, dry rot repair, and seamless gutters.

Customers across Yelp, Angi, and BBB describe a crew that shows up on time, communicates clearly, and responds quickly when a roof starts leaking. From leak repairs and flat-roof work to complete roof replacements, Roofmaster focuses on durable, well-finished results for North Bay properties.

services.title: Re-Roofing & Replacement
services.description: Complete residential and commercial re-roofs, including energy-saving composition shingles built to hold up to North Bay weather.

services.title: Roof Leak Repairs
services.description: Fast response on leaks — the crew comes out quickly to diagnose and repair roof issues before they cause more damage.

services.title: Flat & Cool Roofs
services.description: Hot tar and cool roof systems for flat and low-slope roofs, helping reduce heat and protect commercial and mobile-home structures.

services.title: Shake & Tile Conversions
services.description: Conversions from wood shake to tile or composition, upgrading older roofs to lower-maintenance, fire-conscious systems.

services.title: Dry Rot Repair
services.description: Replacement of damaged wood in eave and roof areas, repairing dry rot before new roofing goes on.

services.title: Seamless Gutters
services.description: Seamless gutter installation to move water off the roof and away from the structure.

testimonials.quote: Their entire crew was punctual and courteous. They not only got our roof done on time, but painted all of the sheet metal on top.
testimonials.author: Santa Rosa homeowner

testimonials.quote: We had a major leak and got a quote from Mark within 24 hours of calling — he put us on the schedule right away.
testimonials.author: North Bay customer

notes: VERIFIED (multi-source: BBB, Yelp, Angi, Birdeye, Central Index, Nextdoor): This is the SANTA ROSA Roofmaster at 1104 Calistoga Rd, Santa Rosa, CA 95409, phone (707) 539-9739. CSLB license #771699 (roofing/C-39 contractor) per BBB; license expiration listed as 11/30/2025 — so it may have lapsed as of this 2026 research and should be re-verified directly at cslb.ca.gov before asserting 'licensed' in outreach. OWNER: Mr. Mark Smonski per BBB (NOT 'Webster' — the lead's 'frwebster@msn.com' email implied surname Webster, but no source confirms a Webster owner; treat owner as Mark Smonski and the Webster surname as UNCONFIRMED/likely a personal email alias). FOUNDING YEAR UNCERTAIN: some directory listings say 'since 1978' / 'energy saving shingles, hot tar/cool roofs, shake/tile conversions, dry rot, seamless gutters,' while BBB-derived data implies a business start of 11/19/1999 and '26 years in business.' Because these conflict, 'established' left blank — do not state a founding year in outreach without confirming. Services (re-roof, leak repair, flat/cool/hot-tar roofs, shake/tile conversion, dry rot, seamless gutters, composition shingles) are consistent across sources. Ratings: Yelp ~4 stars; Angi 5/5; Birdeye 3.9 (11 reviews). DISAMBIGUATION: many unrelated 'Roofmaster'/'Roof Master' firms exist (Brooklyn NY, Los Angeles CA, San Antonio TX, Glendale CA, Vista CA, Webster KY) — none used here. Testimonials are PARAPHRASED from review snippets (Yelp/Birdeye), attributed descriptively rather than verbatim because the original pages (Yelp/BBB/Central Index) returned 403 and could not be read directly; verify exact wording before publishing if exact quotes matter. Website roofingsantarosa.com is DEAD; no live photos obtainable, realPhotoUrls left empty.
